data.title: RED: Write failing tests for security-red-team agent build
data.description:
## Description
Modify tests/unit/scripts/test-build-review-agents.sh to add tests asserting the security-red-team agent is built correctly by build-review-agents.sh.

### Test approach
Run build-review-agents.sh and verify: (a) code-reviewer-security-red-team.md is generated in the output dir, (b) its frontmatter contains model: opus, (c) it contains the security-red-team tier identity text, (d) it contains key security criteria keywords (authorization, data flow, TOCTOU).

### Files to modify
- tests/unit/scripts/test-build-review-agents.sh

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Tests run and FAIL (RED) — security-red-team tier not yet in build script
  Verify: bash tests/unit/scripts/test-build-review-agents.sh 2>&1 | grep -q "FAIL"
- [ ] At least 3 test assertions for security-red-team agent
  Verify: grep -c "security.red.team\|security_red_team" tests/unit/scripts/test-build-review-agents.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 3)}'
